subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We have verily sent unto thee a gleaming ray from the lights of the Countenance, and this, truly, is a mercy from Our presence bestowed upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی قد ارسلنا الیک تجلیا من تجلیات انوار الوجه انه لرحمه من لدنا علیک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for detachment, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @presence of; reunion with God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort
